$comment: Roda o Plugin Check oficial (wp.org) via WordPress Playground, sem Docker. Uso: extrair dist/bible-by-midvash-<v>-wporg.zip num dir temporario e rodar: npx @wp-playground/cli run-blueprint --blueprint=scripts/pcp-blueprint.json --mount=<dir-extraido>/bible-by-midvash:/wordpress/wp-content/plugins/bible-by-midvash --mount=<dir-saida>:/wordpress/pcp-out — resultado em <dir-saida>/result.txt. O stdout do wp-cli e engolido pelo Playground e o subprocess do runcommand nao funciona la, dai o eval-file + launch=false + arquivo montado.

steps.data:
<?php $out = WP_CLI::runcommand('plugin check bible-by-midvash --format=json', array('return' => 'all', 'exit_error' => false, 'launch' => false)); file_put_contents('/wordpress/pcp-out/result.txt', $out->stdout . "
--STDERR--
" . $out->stderr . "
code=" . $out->return_code);
